news.t: Where BlackRock sees ‘tremendous' market opportunities for ETF investors in 2023 after damage to stocks, bonds

holdings.infoBox: VEGI is an equity ETF with a total of 162 individual holdings. The top holdings are Deere & Company stock at 26.98%, Corteva at 9.82%, Archer-Daniels-Midland Company at 7.43%, Nutrien at 6.26%, and CF Industries Holdings at 3.23%.

overview.description: The iShares MSCI Agriculture Producers ETF (VEGI) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in stocks based on a particular theme. The fund tracks a market-cap-weighted index of companies that are sensitive to agricultural commodity prices. VEGI was launched on Jan 31, 2012 and is issued by BlackRock.
infoTable: MSCI ACWI Select Agriculture Producers IMI

data.title: Where BlackRock sees ‘tremendous' market opportunities for ETF investors in 2023 after damage to stocks, bonds
data.text: Hello! In this week's ETF Wrap, BlackRock's Gargi Chaudhuri, head of iShares investment strategy for the Americas, discusses ways for investors to play a world of higher rates and elevated inflation i...
